message:
fix: resolve TypeScript errors in dashboards route and Tooltip component

- dashboards.ts: cast visibility query param to DashboardVisibility for
  exactOptionalPropertyTypes compliance
- Tooltip.tsx: add explicit MouseEvent/FocusEvent types to cloneElement
  callbacks to eliminate implicit any errors

bd-2195

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
